```{r }
library('hpolcc')
load("~/research/hpoltest/deaths.RData")

# add day iid
forres <- hpolcc::hnlm(
  formula= medical ~ dom +  
  f(tempd, model='hiwp',ref_value = 15, p=3, 
  knots = seq(-5, 30, by=2.5), 
  group_var = ecoRegion), 
  data = deaths[
    which(
      deaths$tempd >-5 & deaths$date > as.Date("2006/1/1")
    ), ], 
  config = list(transform_theta = TRUE, 
      dirichlet= TRUE, 
      boundary_is_random = FALSE,
      num_threads=parallel::detectCores(),
      Ngroups = 1e5,
      verbose=10
  ),
  control_inner=list(report.level=0),
  cc_design =  c("cell","ecoRegion", "yearWeek3Dow"),
  for_dev = TRUE
)
x = c(forres$config$beta, forres$config$gamma, forres$config$theta)

adFun = adlaplace::getAdFun(forres$tmb_data, forres$config, package = "hpolcc")

inner_res <- adlaplace::inner_opt(
  parameters = c(forres$config$beta, forres$config$theta),
  gamma = forres$config$gamma,
  control = list(
    maxit = 50,
    report.level = 0,
    report.freq = 0
    ),
  config = modifyList(forres$config,list(num_threads=2, verbose=TRUE)),
  adFun = adFun)
```
